sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available in provided sources

special_mechanics.name: Spring Shoes
special_mechanics.description: Equipment item that increases Mikey's jumping ability. Required to reach certain areas of the map.

special_mechanics.name: Hyper Shoes
special_mechanics.description: Equipment item that increases Mikey's movement speed and makes certain areas more accessible.

special_mechanics.name: Diving Suit
special_mechanics.description: Equipment required to access underwater areas. Limits weapon selection to harpoon gun and bombs.

tier_notes: T2 empirical/qualitative data. Sources document game mechanics and equipment effects but contain no quantified physics parameters. The Goonies II is an early exploration platformer with dual-mode gameplay (platform and first-person adventure). Movement capabilities are modified by collectible items rather than inherent player stats.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Goonies II article
